_authoring_notes: FSI Offers Section 3 — Capabilities. 3-card grid: Cash Offers / Lead Intelligence / Marketing & Follow-Up.
Card pattern: white bg, 1px border, 4px gold top accent bar (matches FSI tile aesthetic).
Each card has H3 + body + availability footer (small caps).
Availability footer surfaces the gating: Free at every tier vs Unlocked at Five Star Alliance.

settings.html:
What FSI Offers Does

A single platform covering the three jobs every real estate professional needs done: generate offers, identify the people on your site, and stay in front of them until they transact.

Cash Offers

Aggregate competitive cash offers from active institutional buyers on any property address. Unlimited submissions. A working tool for listing conversations, off-market opportunities, and investor outreach.

Free at every tier

Lead Intelligence

Identify the people visiting your site. Names, phone numbers, email, browsing behavior, session replay, and property-level data including valuation and equity estimates. Skip trace built in.

Unlocked at Five Star Alliance

Marketing & Follow-Up

Hosted website, single-property pages, landing page builder, embeddable widgets, and CRM automation that routes leads where you actually work them. The full marketing stack, ready on day one.

Unlocked at Five Star Alliance
